channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Saudi Arabia and UAE condemn Iranian attacks
item.description: Saudi and UAE ambassadors to the UN condemn Iranian attacks ahead of Security Council meeting.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 13 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Cyberattacks, tensions in the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices are deepening the global consequences of the war.

item.title: France walks ‘fine line’ as US-Israel war on Iran escalates
item.description: President Macron has criticised the onslaught and questioned the war's legality but ultimately blamed Iran.

item.title: Analysis: The war on Iran is at a crossroads
item.description: Iran is raising the costs of a continued war, for the US and Gulf nations. But could it — and the US — escalate further?

item.title: ‘A US military victory in Iran without a political one is not a victory’
item.description: ‘This is not a war about whose military is better, bigger or more powerful.’

item.title: In the US-Israeli war on Iran, who will run out of missiles first?
item.description: Are there enough interceptor missiles to defeat Iran’s response to the US and Israel's attacks?

item.title: Trump admin estimates US war on Iran cost $11.3bn in first 6 days: Report
item.description: Lawmakers express concerns as Trump officials project $50bn more may be needed for Iran war funding.

item.title: Israeli ‘double-tap strike’ hits displaced on Beirut seafront, kills eight
item.description: The attack appears to be another Israeli attempted assassination, outside areas traditionally targeted.

item.title: Iran targets Gulf nations with missiles, drones as oil prices soar
item.description: Bahrain reports an attack on fuel tanks as Saudi Arabia shoots down drones headed towards an oilfield.

item.title: There is only one person’ who can decide to end the war on Iran
item.description: Israeli journalist and writer, Gideon Levy, says the decision to end the Iran war rests only with US President Trump.
